title: Vanity: Elementals
body:
❓ About:
========

*   This is a Vanity pack made that adds in several different types of Elemental Based Weaponry to the game!
*   Said Elemental Weapon Types include: Subzero, Molten, Thunder & Terra!

❗️ Important:
=============

*   This REQUIRES [Vanity: Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vanity) in order to work, this does nothing on its own.
*   You are able to acquire the Elemental Designs by trading with Stylist Villagers.
*   Works on BOTH Fabric & Forge!

* * *
